overall.description: First-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 inside a retro-futuristic diner. The player follows an NPC from the counter to a booth, shares a meal and conversation while seated, then exits through the back into a neon-lit urban alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: retro diner counter area with checkered flooring

events.description: NPC in straw hat gets up from counter and walks toward booth seating
Camera sits down at booth across from NPC, shifting to seated perspective

agents.ego_description: Walking from the diner counter to a red banquette booth and sitting down across from the man in the hat

notable_agents.action: Man in straw hat and patterned shirt walking from counter to booth and sitting down
Bartender standing behind the green counter preparing food

entered.detail: L-shaped counter with teal green facade and stainless steel top
Red ketchup bottles and napkin holders on counter
Open magazines and menus spread on the counter
Black and white checkered tile flooring throughout diner
Glass door entrance showing street outside with neon lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a retro diner counter with green facade and checkered floors. The player follows an NPC wearing a straw hat from the counter to a red banquette booth near the large curved window, then sits down across from him.

scene_state.functional_zone: booth seating with view of neon city street

events.description: Player and NPC begin eating pizza at the table, interacting with food items
Dialogue subtitles appear on screen as conversation progresses

agents.ego_description: Sitting in the booth eating pizza and engaging in conversation with the NPC, occasionally looking out the window

notable_agents.action: Man in hat eating pizza and gesturing while talking

entered.detail: Red Formica table surface with plates and condiments
Two plates with pizza slices and drinks
Retro purple dome-shaped lamp on the table
Large curved window showing neon-lit city street and buildings outside
Decorative posters and stickers on green wall including circular signage

segments.scene_description: Seated in the red banquette booth, the player shares a meal of pizza with the NPC while conversing. A purple retro lamp illuminates the table as neon city lights glow through the large curved window, creating a warm, intimate atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner interior corridor toward back exit

events.description: Player stands up from booth and begins walking toward the back of the diner
Camera passes close by a patron in a yellow dress standing near the bathroom door

agents.ego_description: Getting up from the booth and walking through the diner interior toward the back exit door

notable_agents.action: Person in yellow dress standing near the bathroom door
Customer with red hair sitting on a counter stool

entered.detail: Red rotating bar stools lined up at the counter
Television screen mounted on the wall near the bathroom
Doorway leading to back alley with cyan neon light visible outside

segments.scene_description: The player gets up from the booth and walks through the diner's interior, passing red banquette seating and the counter area. Other patrons are visible, including a person in a yellow dress near the bathroom and a customer at the counter, as the camera approaches the back exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban back alley with neon signage

events.description: Exits the diner through the back door into a narrow alleyway
Lighting shifts from warm interior to cool neon exterior with red accent lights on the ground

agents.ego_description: Walking out of the diner into the back alley and observing the urban environment

entered.detail: Wet concrete ground scattered with cardboard debris and trash
Cyan neon arrow sign with Japanese characters pointing left
Closed metal security shutter with red light glowing underneath
Scattered cardboard boxes and litter on the ground
Blurred neon signs and city lights visible down the alley

segments.scene_description: Stepping out of the diner into a narrow back alley, the environment shifts to a darker urban setting with wet concrete ground. A prominent cyan neon arrow sign glows on the left wall, while red lights illuminate a metal roll-up door on the right, creating a typical cyberpunk alley atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the warm, nostalgic interior of a retro-futuristic diner into a cold, neon-lit urban alleyway. It begins at a green diner counter with checkered floors, following an NPC in a straw hat toward a red banquette booth situated by a large curved window. As the camera settles into the booth, the atmosphere becomes intimate, illuminated by a purple retro lamp and the glow of city lights while the player shares a pizza with the NPC. The scene then shifts as the player rises and walks back through the diner, passing other patrons and the counter area before approaching the back exit. Finally, the camera steps out of the warmth and into a narrow alley of wet concrete, where the lighting transforms into a stark cyberpunk palette of cyan neon arrows and red glows against metal roll-up doors.
